SLIMEBOSS-BLACK_HEART_OF_GOO.title: Black Heart of Goo
SLIMEBOSS-BLACK_HEART_OF_GOO.description: Replaces {{R|Heart of Goo}}. Whenever you Consume, heal 3 HP, up to 15 each combat.
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_DWELLER.title: Goop Dweller
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_DWELLER.description: At the start of combat, Split into a Bruiser Slime.
SLIMEBOSS-GOOP_DWELLER.flavor: He followed me home. Can I keep it?
SLIMEBOSS-GREED_OOZE.title: Greed Ooze
SLIMEBOSS-GREED_OOZE.description: At the start of combat, spawn Greed Ooze (can be revived if Absorbed. At Rest Sites, Greed Ooze will take 50 of your souls, increasing its damage by 1.
SLIMEBOSS-GREED_OOZE.flavor: A friend found in the Spire who devours souls.
SLIMEBOSS-HEART_OF_GOO.title: Heart of Goo
SLIMEBOSS-HEART_OF_GOO.description: Whenever you Consume, heal 2 HP, up to 8 each combat.
SLIMEBOSS-JEREMIAHS_BANNER.title: Jeremiah's Banner
SLIMEBOSS-JEREMIAHS_BANNER.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Slime slot and Split into a random Slime.
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.title: Protective Gear
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.description: Reduce the damage you take from Tackles by 3.
SLIMEBOSS-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.flavor: The best defense is a good offense.
SLIMEBOSS-SCRAP_OOZE.title: Scrap Ooze
SLIMEBOSS-SCRAP_OOZE.description: At the start of combat, spawn Scrap Ooze (can be revived if Absorbed. At Rest Sites, you can donate a card to the Scrap Ooze, modifying its +1 damage for Uncommons +2 damage for Rares -1 damage for Commons -2 damage for {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses}}
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMED_TAIL.title: Slimed Tail
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMED_TAIL.flavor: A fake tail to trick enemies during combat, completely covered in slime.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMY_SKULL.title: Slimy Skull
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMY_SKULL.description: Whenever you apply Goop, apply an additional 1 Goop.
SLIMEBOSS-SLIMY_SKULL.flavor: A Snecko skull in absolutely awful condition. Unclean and slimy, dirt and grime stick to it like glue.
SLIMEBOSS-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.title: Stone of Nomakk
SLIMEBOSS-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Potency.
SLIMEBOSS-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.flavor: When presented to one of your Goop Gang, it seems to make the blob dance.
SLIMEBOSS-TARR_BLOB.title: Tarr Blob
SLIMEBOSS-TARR_BLOB.description: Gain @SlE at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, lose 1 Slime slot.
